payload.title: Surface remote-binding state in /api/meta
payload.description: When the local server is bound to a remote (.scope/remote.json present + a credential available), expose meta.remote = { url, project, connected, role } — verifying the key against the remote (GET /api/projects) to fill connected + the caller's role. The web app reads meta.remote to decide whether to show the collaboration UI (instead of meta.hosted alone).
